scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api -w apps/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/engine -w apps/api && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
